channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: Do you think social media should be banned? #SocialMedia #Indonesia #TikTok #YouTube #Roblox #Meta #News #BBCNews
item.description: Do you think social media should be banned? #SocialMedia #Indonesia #TikTok #YouTube #Roblox #Meta #News #BBCNews

item.title: Schools in England must give allergy awareness training to all staff for the first time, under new government guidance. #Allergy #UK #England #Allergies #School #BBCNews
item.description: Schools in England must give allergy awareness training to all staff for the first time, under new government guidance. #Allergy #UK #England #Allergies #School #BBCNews

item.title: Dozens of people have been killed in an Israeli military operation against Hezbollah in Nabi Chit in the Bekaa Valley in eastern Lebanon, officials have said. #Lebanon #BekaaValley #NabiChit #Israel #News #BBCNews
item.description: Dozens of people have been killed in an Israeli military operation against Hezbollah in Nabi Chit in the Bekaa Valley in eastern Lebanon, officials have said. #Lebanon #BekaaValley #NabiChit #Israel #News #BBCNews

item.title: Onlookers captured footage of the moment a tornado swept through the US state of Michigan, destroying homes and uprooting trees. #Michigan #Tornado #Storm #US #BBCNews
item.description: Onlookers captured footage of the moment a tornado swept through the US state of Michigan, destroying homes and uprooting trees. #Michigan #Tornado #Storm #US #BBCNews

item.title: Oil depots In Tehran were engulfed in fire after being hit by intense aerial bombardment overnight, with locals reporting multiple explosions. #Iran #Oil #Israel #US #Fire #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: Oil depots In Tehran were engulfed in fire after being hit by intense aerial bombardment overnight, with locals reporting multiple explosions. #Iran #Oil #Israel #US #Fire #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: UN humanitarian chief Tom Fletcher said the war in Iran and wider region is having a "massive impact" on civilians, describing it as "a moment of grave, grave peril". #Iran #War #UN #BBCNews
item.description: UN humanitarian chief Tom Fletcher said the war in Iran and wider region is having a "massive impact" on civilians, describing it as "a moment of grave, grave peril". #Iran #War #UN #BBCNews

item.title: An Iranian drone strike on a government building in Kuwait sparked a huge fire overnight. #Iran #KuwaitCity #Israel #US #Fire #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: An Iranian drone strike on a government building in Kuwait sparked a huge fire overnight. #Iran #KuwaitCity #Israel #US #Fire #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: Smoke was seen rising from a building in Dubai on Saturday as Iran fired retaliatory strikes on neighbouring countries. #Dubai #Iran #IranWar #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Smoke was seen rising from a building in Dubai on Saturday as Iran fired retaliatory strikes on neighbouring countries. #Dubai #Iran #IranWar #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Israeli President Isaac Herzog said he “hopes” the Iranian people will rise up against the regime in the country despite ongoing US-Israeli strikes. #Israel #US #Iran #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Israeli President Isaac Herzog said he “hopes” the Iranian people will rise up against the regime in the country despite ongoing US-Israeli strikes. #Israel #US #Iran #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Some young women are deciding to freeze their eggs because of uncertain relationships, health issues, and to enjoy their freedom without fears of declining fertility.⁣ #EggFreezing #Egg #Women #WomensHealth #GenZ #Pregnancy #BBCNews
item.description: Some young women are deciding to freeze their eggs because of uncertain relationships, health issues, and to enjoy their freedom without fears of declining fertility.⁣ #EggFreezing #Egg #Women #WomensHealth #GenZ #Pregnancy #BBCNews

item.title: The Iranian ambassador in London warned the UK to be "very careful" about becoming further involved in the war. #Iran #UK #Israel #BBCNews
item.description: The Iranian ambassador in London warned the UK to be "very careful" about becoming further involved in the war. #Iran #UK #Israel #BBCNews

item.title: Lebanese officials reported multiple strikes overnight, including one which they said was an Israeli airstrike on a hotel, killing at least four people. Israel said it was targeting Iranian commanders in the Lebanese capital. #Israel #Iran #Lebanon #US #M
item.description: Lebanese officials reported multiple strikes overnight, including one which they said was an Israeli airstrike on a hotel, killing at least four people. Israel said it was targeting Iranian commanders in the Lebanese capital. #Israel #Iran #Lebanon #US #M

item.title: Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper hits back at Donald Trump over UK's lack of involvement in Iran. #KeirStarmer #UK #UKPolitics #DonaldTrump #Iran #BBCNews
item.description: Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper hits back at Donald Trump over UK's lack of involvement in Iran. #KeirStarmer #UK #UKPolitics #DonaldTrump #Iran #BBCNews

item.title: Oil depots in Iran were hit by intense US-Israeli aerial bombardment, and locals reported multiple explosions. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Oil depots in Iran were hit by intense US-Israeli aerial bombardment, and locals reported multiple explosions. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of killed Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, has been chosen as Iran’s new supreme leader, state media report. #MojtabaKhamenei #Iran #AliKhamenei #BreakingNews #BBCNews
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of killed Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, has been chosen as Iran’s new supreme leader, state media report. #MojtabaKhamenei #Iran #AliKhamenei #BreakingNews #BBCNews

item.title: Iran has appointed a new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed at his compound in Tehran in the first wave of US and Israeli strikes. #MojtabaKhamenei #Iran #AliKhamenei#BBCNews
item.description: Iran has appointed a new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed at his compound in Tehran in the first wave of US and Israeli strikes. #MojtabaKhamenei #Iran #AliKhamenei#BBCNews

item.title: Major fire in Glasgow closes the city’s Central Station, with Scottish First Minister John Swinney saying he is “deeply concerned”. #Glasgow #CentralStation #Fire #Scotland #BBCNews
item.description: Major fire in Glasgow closes the city’s Central Station, with Scottish First Minister John Swinney saying he is “deeply concerned”. #Glasgow #CentralStation #Fire #Scotland #BBCNews

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in US-Israeli strikes, has been chosen as his successor. #Iran #SupremeLeader #MiddleEast #MojtabaKhamenei #Politics #News #BBCNews
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in US-Israeli strikes, has been chosen as his successor. #Iran #SupremeLeader #MiddleEast #MojtabaKhamenei #Politics #News #BBCNews

item.title: The benchmark oil price has passed $100 a barrel for first time since 2022 as the war in the Middle East continues, with G7 finance ministers set for emergency talks later. #Oil #MiddleEast #G7 #News #BBCNews
item.description: The benchmark oil price has passed $100 a barrel for first time since 2022 as the war in the Middle East continues, with G7 finance ministers set for emergency talks later. #Oil #MiddleEast #G7 #News #BBCNews

item.title: The party of rapper and ex-Kathmandu mayor Balendra Shah is on course to win a landslide majority in Nepal's parliament. #Protests #Nepal #Politics #BBCNews
item.description: The party of rapper and ex-Kathmandu mayor Balendra Shah is on course to win a landslide majority in Nepal's parliament. #Protests #Nepal #Politics #BBCNews

item.title: The fireball was spotted around dusk on Sunday and was also visible in the Netherlands and Belgium. #Meteor #Astronomy #Germany #Space #BBCNews
item.description: The fireball was spotted around dusk on Sunday and was also visible in the Netherlands and Belgium. #Meteor #Astronomy #Germany #Space #BBCNews

item.title: Following his phone call with US President Donald Trump, PM Keir Starmer said the UK and US are continuing to work together over events in the Middle East. #KeirStarmer #DonaldTrump #Diplomacy #Iran #MiddleEast #UKPolitics #BBCNews
item.description: Following his phone call with US President Donald Trump, PM Keir Starmer said the UK and US are continuing to work together over events in the Middle East. #KeirStarmer #DonaldTrump #Diplomacy #Iran #MiddleEast #UKPolitics #BBCNews

item.title: Flames spread through a Victorian building next to Glasgow Central station after the fire began in a vape shop on Sunday. #Glasgow #Scotland #Rail #Trains #BBCNews
item.description: Flames spread through a Victorian building next to Glasgow Central station after the fire began in a vape shop on Sunday. #Glasgow #Scotland #Rail #Trains #BBCNews

item.title: The suspect, a woman in her 30s has been taken into custody and has not yet been publicly identified. #Rihanna #BeverlyHills #LosAngeles #USA #BBCNews
item.description: The suspect, a woman in her 30s has been taken into custody and has not yet been publicly identified. #Rihanna #BeverlyHills #LosAngeles #USA #BBCNews

item.title: All train services at Glasgow Central, Scotland's busiest station, have been cancelled after a fire which began at a vape shop caused a Victorian building to collapse. #Glasgow #Fire #Vape #Victorian #Train #GlasgowCentral #BBCNews
item.description: All train services at Glasgow Central, Scotland's busiest station, have been cancelled after a fire which began at a vape shop caused a Victorian building to collapse. #Glasgow #Fire #Vape #Victorian #Train #GlasgowCentral #BBCNews

item.title: President Volodymyr Zelensky has said Ukrainian drone experts will arrive in the Middle East this week to help Gulf states under attack from Iran. #Ukraine #Russia #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #Gulf #BBCNews
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky has said Ukrainian drone experts will arrive in the Middle East this week to help Gulf states under attack from Iran. #Ukraine #Russia #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #Gulf #BBCNews

item.title: The benchmark oil price has passed $100 a barrel for the first time since 2022. #Oil #MiddleEast #Iran #War #BBCNews
item.description: The benchmark oil price has passed $100 a barrel for the first time since 2022. #Oil #MiddleEast #Iran #War #BBCNews

item.title: The weekly Official UK Christian & Gospel Singles Chart has been launched to "highlight singles released by British artists" based on UK sales and streams. #GospelMusic #Christianity #UKMusic #Top10 #BBCNews
item.description: The weekly Official UK Christian & Gospel Singles Chart has been launched to "highlight singles released by British artists" based on UK sales and streams. #GospelMusic #Christianity #UKMusic #Top10 #BBCNews

item.title: The conflict in the Middle East in now in its tenth day after the US and Israel launched wide-ranging strikes on Iran, killing the country's supreme leader on 28 February. Iran has responded by launching attacks on Israel and US-allied states in the Gulf,
item.description: The conflict in the Middle East in now in its tenth day after the US and Israel launched wide-ranging strikes on Iran, killing the country's supreme leader on 28 February. Iran has responded by launching attacks on Israel and US-allied states in the Gulf,

item.title: On Saturday, US President Donald Trump said Iran was to blame for the strike on the school. Iran has blamed the US and Israel for the attack. Neither the US nor Israel has publicly accepted or denied responsibility. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: On Saturday, US President Donald Trump said Iran was to blame for the strike on the school. Iran has blamed the US and Israel for the attack. Neither the US nor Israel has publicly accepted or denied responsibility. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews
